verse_text: I will show Him, but not now; I bless Him, but He is not near. A Star shall rise out of Jacob; And a Man shall rise out of Israel. He shall break in pieces the rulers of Moab And plunder all the sons of Seth.

links.context: The star proclaims the extraordinary birth of Christ. To ancient pagans, a star signified a god, a deified king ([[NUM.24:17]]). Christ being born under this star fulfills the prophecy in [[PSA.109:3]] and shows all of creation participating in the Incarnation. (See also Pss 18:2; 148:3.)
